methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 11 same-sector + similar-valuation-tier peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 24.2x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Credo Semiconductor
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $5B+

private.name: Ouster
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1.5B

data.narrative:
Aeva Technologies is a publicly listed semiconductor company founded by Soroush Salehian that has raised over $660M and currently trades at a valuation above $1.0B. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 11 companies in the Chips & Semiconductors sector, spanning both public equities (3 tickers: ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and private ventures at similar valuation tiers (8 companies including Etched, SambaNova Systems, Credo Semiconductor, Tenstorrent, and Rebellions).

The applicable triangulation method is peer-median analysis. Across the 11 same-sector comparables, the median valuation is $2.0B, with a range spanning $500M to $5.0B. This method anchors the primary valuation signal given Aeva's stage and sector positioning relative to the peer cohort. A second method—public-comp anchoring using semiconductor P/S multiples of 24.2x (median across ALAB, NVDA, AMD)—is not applicable because Aeva's revenue has not been disclosed, limiting revenue-multiple triangulation.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.7B to $2.3B, centered on a median of $2.0B. This sits above Aeva's stated current valuation floor of $1.0B. Key uncertainties include the lack of disclosed financials needed for multiple-based validation and the heterogeneity within the peer set, which spans Series A through public stages. The single-method foundation warrants caution; revenue disclosure would enable a more robust triangulation.
